name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn
N \in Nat
N > 0

(* State variables *)
state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
turn \in 1..N

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ turn \in 1..N
        /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
        /\ \A p \in 1..N : state[p] = "idle"

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
          /\ turn' = p
          /\ \A q \in 1..N :
                /\ q # p
                /\ state[q] = "critical"
                /\ turn' = q
          /\ \A q \in 1..N :
                /\ q # p
                /\ state[q] = "idle"
                /\ turn' = turn

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* TypeOK ensures the queue is a sequence of length <= K *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ size \in 0..K

(* Init sets the queue to empty *)
Init == 
  /\ q = <<>>
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ size = 0

(* Next action: either producer or consumer *)
Next == 
  \/ (* Producer *)
     /\ size < K
     /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  (* Enqueue 1 *)
     /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
     /\ size' = size + 1
     /\ head' = head
  \/ (* Consumer *)
     /\ size > 0
     /\ q' = Tail(q)
     /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
     /\ size' = size - 1
     /\ tail' = tail

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, r

Init == /\ readers = <<>> 
      /\ writer_active = 0

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = 0
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
          /\ r' \in 1..10
          /\ r' \notin readers
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
      \/ /\ writer_active = 0
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers
          /\ r' \in 1..10
          /\ r' \in readers
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
          /\ readers' = Remove(readers, r)
      \/ /\ writer_active = 0
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
          /\ r' \in 1..10
          /\ r' \notin readers
          /\ writer_active' = 1
          /\ readers' = readers
      \/ /\ writer_active = 1
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers
          /\ r' \in 1..10
          /\ r' \in readers
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
          /\ readers' = Remove(readers, r)
      \/ /\ writer_active = 1
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers
          /\ r' \in 1..10
          /\ r' \notin readers
          /\ writer_active' = 0
          /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY, FiniteSet
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ sentChunks \in FiniteSet
    /\ retransmitCount \in FiniteSet
    /\ channel \in FiniteSet

Init ==
    /\ file = Seq
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, i*CHUNK_SIZE)

            SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, FILE_SIZE)
        ]
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ retransmitCount = {}
    /\ channel = {}

Next ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) :
        /\ i \notin sentChunks
        /\ i \in retransmitCount
            => retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
        /\ i \notin retransmitCount
            => retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = 1]
        /\ i \in retransmitCount
            /\ retransmitCount[i] <= MAX_RETRIES
            /\ channel' = Append(channel, chunks[i])
        /\ i \in retransmitCount
            /\ retransmitCount[i] > MAX_RETRIES
            /\ channel' = channel
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
    /\ \E msg \in channel :
        /\ channel' = Delete(channel, msg)
    /\ \E msg \in channel :
        /\ channel' = Delete(channel, msg)
    /\ channel' = channel

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>>
